data.title: Peak Minerals Rebrands as Sranan Gold Corp. to Focus on Suriname Exploration
data.description:
The latest update is out from Peak Minerals Ltd. ( (TSE:PEK) ).

Peak Minerals Ltd. has announced a name change to Sranan Gold Corp., reflecting its focus on gold exploration in Suriname. The company’s shares will trade under the new symbol ‘SRAN’ on the Canadian Securities Exchange starting April 8, 2025. This rebranding aligns with the company’s strategic focus on its Tapanahony Project, which shows promising gold exploration potential. The name ‘Sranan’ signifies Suriname in the local dialect, highlighting the company’s commitment to the region. The change is not expected to disrupt trading activities, and shareholders are not required to take any action regarding their share certificates.

More about Peak Minerals Ltd.

Peak Minerals Ltd. is a company involved in mineral exploration and the acquisition of mineral property assets, primarily in Suriname. The company focuses on the Tapanahony Project, a significant gold exploration site in Suriname, and also explores the Aida Property in the Kamloops Mining Division.

YTD Price Performance: 48.00%

Average Trading Volume: 66,326

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

For an in-depth examination of PEK stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: American Shared Hospital Services Appoints New CEO
data.description:
American Shared Hospital Services ( (AMS) ) has issued an announcement.

On April 3, 2025, American Shared Hospital Services announced the appointment of Gary Delanois as the new Chief Executive Officer, succeeding Raymond Stachowiak, who will remain as Executive Chairman. The company reported strong financial results for 2024, with a 32.9% increase in revenue driven by strategic expansion and operational strength. The acquisition of radiation therapy centers and new facility openings have been pivotal in this growth. The company is transitioning from a leasing model to a direct provider of radiation therapy services, aiming for sustainable long-term growth through increased patient volumes and operational enhancements.

More about American Shared Hospital Services

American Shared Hospital Services (AMS) is a leading provider of turnkey solutions to cancer treatment centers, health systems, and cancer networks in North and South America. The company specializes in stereotactic radiosurgery equipment and advanced radiation therapy cancer treatment services, offering integrated cancer care in partnership with health systems.

YTD Price Performance: -5.43%

Average Trading Volume: 14,474

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $19M

data.title: BH Macro Limited Acquires 150,000 Own Shares for Treasury
data.description:
BH Macro Shs GBP ( (GB:BHMG) ) has shared an announcement.

BH Macro Limited announced the purchase of 150,000 of its ordinary Sterling shares on the London Stock Exchange from J.P. Morgan Securities plc. The shares were bought at prices ranging from 373.00 to 381.50 pence, with a weighted average price of 377.6812 pence, and will be held in treasury. This transaction affects the total number of shares in issue, impacting the company’s voting rights, which now total 515,368,807. This move could influence the company’s market positioning and shareholder value.

More about BH Macro Shs GBP

BH Macro Limited is a closed-ended collective investment scheme based in Guernsey, focusing on investments in various financial instruments. The company operates with limited liability and is listed on the London Stock Exchange, engaging in the management and trading of its shares.

YTD Price Performance: -7.64%

Average Trading Volume: 674,338

data.title: Haleon PLC Announces Virtual 2025 Annual General Meeting
data.description:
An update from Haleon PLC Sponsored ADR ( (HLN) ) is now available.

On April 4, 2025, Haleon PLC announced the availability of documents for its 2025 Annual General Meeting (AGM), scheduled to be held virtually on May 28, 2025. The AGM will be broadcast from the company’s London offices, and shareholders can access the Notice of the AGM, Form of Proxy, and AGM Voting Instruction Card on Haleon’s website. This announcement underscores Haleon’s commitment to maintaining transparency and engagement with its shareholders, reflecting its strategic focus on leveraging digital channels for stakeholder communication.

More about Haleon PLC Sponsored ADR

Haleon PLC is a global leader in consumer health, focusing on delivering better everyday health with humanity. The company offers a diverse product portfolio across five major categories: Oral Health, Pain Relief, Respiratory Health, Digestive Health, and Vitamins, Minerals, and Supplements (VMS). Haleon is known for its long-standing brands such as Advil, Sensodyne, Panadol, Voltaren, Theraflu, Otrivin, Polident, parodontax, and Centrum, which are built on trusted science and innovation.

data.title: Aberforth Smaller Companies Trust PLC Executes Share Buyback
data.description:
Aberforth Smaller Companies Trust PLC ( (GB:ASL) ) just unveiled an update.

Aberforth Smaller Companies Trust PLC is involved in the financial industry, focusing on investments in smaller companies. The company announced a market purchase of 25,000 of its own ordinary shares at a price of 1,260.48p per share. This transaction is part of the authority granted at their Annual General Meeting to repurchase shares, leading to a total of 451,000 shares being purchased and cancelled under this authority. Following this transaction, 82,208,105 ordinary shares remain in issue.

data.title: IWG CEO Transfers Shares to Owned Entity, Retains Control
data.description:
IWG plc ( (GB:IWG) ) has issued an announcement.

Mark Dixon, CEO of International Workplace Group plc, transferred 128,677 ordinary shares to Estorn Limited, a company he fully owns, without altering his overall shareholding or voting rights in IWG. This transaction maintains Dixon’s significant influence in the company, holding approximately 25.3% of the total voting rights, reflecting stability in his control and potential strategic positioning within the company.

More about IWG plc

International Workplace Group plc (IWG) operates in the flexible workspace industry, providing office space solutions and services to businesses worldwide. The company focuses on offering adaptable work environments to cater to the evolving needs of modern enterprises.

data.title: Kermode Resources Completes Shares-for-Debt Transaction
data.description:
Kermode Resources ( (TSE:KLM) ) has issued an announcement.

Kermode Resources Ltd. has completed a shares-for-debt transaction, settling $60,000 of debt by issuing 6,000,000 common shares at $0.01 per share. This transaction includes a related party component involving $20,000 held by insiders, but it was exempt from certain regulatory requirements due to its small size relative to the company’s market capitalization.

More about Kermode Resources

Kermode Resources Ltd. is a junior mining company focused on exploring opportunities worldwide.

data.title: BAWAG Group AG Announces Change in Major Shareholdings
data.description:
An announcement from BAWAG Group AG ( (DE:0B2) ) is now available.

BAWAG Group AG has announced a change in its major holdings, as Wellington Management Group LLP has adjusted its shareholding in the company. The notification indicates a slight decrease in the percentage of voting rights held by Wellington, which now stands at 3.96%, down from a previous 4.12%. This adjustment in holdings may impact the company’s shareholder structure and influence future voting outcomes.

More about BAWAG Group AG

BAWAG Group AG is a financial services company based in Vienna, Austria. It primarily operates in the banking sector, offering a range of financial products and services. The company is listed on the Vienna Stock Exchange and focuses on providing banking solutions to its customers.

data.title: Foseco India Limited Announces Key Management and Auditor Changes
data.description:
Foseco India Limited ( (IN:FOSECOIND) ) has shared an announcement.

Foseco India Limited announced several key changes following its Board Meeting on April 4, 2025. The company has appointed J B Bhave & Co. as the new Secretarial Auditor for a five-year term, replacing Rajesh Karunakaran & Co. Additionally, Vineet Thakar, the Sales, Marketing & Technology Director, has resigned, and Amit Kumar has been appointed as the new Commercial Director effective April 7, 2025. These changes reflect a strategic shift in the company’s management and governance structure, potentially impacting its operational focus and stakeholder relations.

data.title: DuPont Under Investigation by Chinese Market Regulator
data.description:
DuPont de Nemours ( (DD) ) just unveiled an announcement.

DuPont is cooperating with an investigation by the State Administration for Market Regulation of China concerning its Tyvek® business. In 2024, Tyvek® sales to China were approximately $90 million, representing less than 1% of DuPont’s total net sales, indicating limited financial impact on the company.

More about DuPont de Nemours

DuPont de Nemours, Inc. operates in the chemical industry, focusing on products such as Tyvek®, which is used in various applications including construction and protective apparel.
